name: Kobold
flavour: While they can live to be more than a century, most perish before they reach a few decades.

name: White Wyrmling
effect: You may devour a card in the market.
flavour: White wyrmlings are born with two basic urges: hunger and greed.

name: Watcher of Thay
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ +3 influence
flavour: “What you seek can be bought only with blood.”

name: Dragon Cultist
flavour: Devoted to bringing an age of draconic rule.

name: Wyrmspeaker
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: Fanatics gifted with the ability to convince dragons to join their cause.

name: Black Wyrmling
flavour: So many tasty snacks, so little time.

name: Cult Fanatic
effect: You may devour a card in the market.
flavour: “To feel the blood of dragons in your veins is to feel invincible!”

name: Enchanter of Thay
effect: • Return one of your spies ▶ +4 power
flavour: “Willing or unwilling, it matters not; your services are required.”

name: Green Wyrmling
effect: Place a spy. If another player's troop is at that site, gain 2 influence.
flavour: Fresh out of the egg, a wyrmling's poison can dissolve bone and eat through steel.

name: Cleric of Laogzed
effect: At end of turn, promote another card played this turn.
flavour: Its stench is exceeded only by its hunger for fresh meat.

name: Dragonclaw
effect: Assassinate a troop. Then, if you have 5 or more player troops in your trophy hall, gain 2 power.
flavour: The colors of their tattoos are based on the dragons they revere.

name: Blue Wyrmling
effect: Return another player's troop or spy.
flavour: Even a blue wyrmling will not tolerate insubordination to its kind.

name: Red Wyrmling
flavour: The first thing a red wyrmling develops is its profound sense of arrogance.

name: Rath Modar
flavour: “Dragons are tools, and with them I shall build empires.”

name: White Dragon
effect: Gain 1 VP for every 2 sites you control.
flavour: “They're dumb all right, but if they smell your blood, they'll hunt you till doomsday.” —Caldourn Truespear, dragonhunter

name: Green Dragon
effect: • Place a spy, then supplant a troop at that spy's site.
• Return one of your spies ▶ Supplant a troop at that spy's site, then gain 1 VP for each site control marker you have.
flavour: Green dragons measure plans in centuries.

name: Severin Silrajin
flavour: “I have been given insight into a destiny far greater than I could have imagined.”

name: Black Dragon
effect: Supplant a white troop anywhere on the board.
Gain 1 VP for every 3 white troops in your trophy hall.
flavour: Those who witness its dark majesty fall to their knees in worship.

name: Red Dragon
effect: Gain 1 VP for each site under your total control.
flavour: “If you ever see one of these, run.” —Blacksoot, the Charred

name: Blue Dragon
effect: At end of turn, promote up to 2 other cards played this turn, then gain 1 VP for every 3 cards in your inner circle.
flavour: “Above, below, it matters not. Dragonkind will rule all.”
